member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.AmplifySignalRequest
member.summary: Request model for amplifying a signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.AmplifySignalRequest.Reason
member.summary: The reason for amplifying the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.AmplifySignalRequest.Commentary
member.summary: Optional commentary about the amplification.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateIdeaRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating an idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateIdeaRequest.Title
member.summary: The title of the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateIdeaRequest.Description
member.summary: The description of the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateIdeaRequest.Tags
member.summary: The tags for the idea, comma-separated.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateIdeaRequest.SourceSignalId
member.summary: The source signal ID that this idea is based on.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSignalRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSignalRequest.Title
member.summary: The title of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSignalRequest.Description
member.summary: The description of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSignalRequest.Tags
member.summary: The tags for the signal, comma-separated.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSignalRequest.LocalityId
member.summary: The locality ID where the signal should be created.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.CreateSignalResponse
member.summary: Response model for signal creation.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.CreateSignalResponse.SignalId
member.summary: The ID of the created signal.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CreateSignalResponse class.
member.param: The ID of the created signal.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse
member.summary: Response model for idea information.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Id
member.summary: The ID of the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Title
member.summary: The title of the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Description
member.summary: The description of the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.SourceSignalId
member.summary: The source signal ID that this idea is based on.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.SourceSignalTitle
member.summary: The title of the source signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Contributors
member.summary: The number of contributors to this idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Amendments
member.summary: The number of amendments made to this idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the idea was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.UpdatedAt
member.summary: When the idea was last updated.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Tags
member.summary: The tags associated with this idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.IdeaResponse.Status
member.summary: The status of the idea.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the IdeaResponse class.
member.param: When the idea was last updated.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse
member.summary: Response model for signal information with pseudonym privacy protection.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.SignalId
member.summary: The ID of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.Title
member.summary: The title of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.Description
member.summary: The description of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.OriginatorPseudonym
member.summary: The pseudonym of the signal originator.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.Status
member.summary: The status of the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.CapturedOn
member.summary: When the signal was captured.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.LocalityId
member.summary: The locality ID where this signal is relevant.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.Amplifications
member.summary: The amplifications for this signal.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SignalResponse class.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse
member.summary: Response model for signal amplification with pseudonym privacy protection.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.AmplificationId
member.summary: The ID of the amplification.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.AmplifierPseudonym
member.summary: The pseudonym of the participant who amplified the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.Reason
member.summary: The reason for the amplification.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.Commentary
member.summary: Optional commentary provided with the amplification.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.AmplifiedOn
member.summary: When the amplification occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the amplification is active (not withdrawn).

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Responses.SignalAmplificationResponse.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SignalAmplificationResponse class.
